<!-- Title must follow Conventional Commits, e.g. "feat(billing): add proration" -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link the issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor / perf / chore
- [ ] docs / test / ci
- [ ] breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional-commit PR title
- [ ] Tests added/updated; `pytest` and frontend tests pass locally
- [ ] No new lint failures (`ruff check`, `eslint`, `tsc`)
- [ ] Migrations included and reversible (no destructive change without a plan)
- [ ] Secrets/config changes documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] Considered security & RBAC impact
